// NOTE: Headless CI typecheck config. Separate from tsconfig.json (editor-facing) and tsconfig.test.json (test-runtime path mappings). Adds path mappings to types/pi-shims.d.ts so tsc --noEmit can resolve @earendil-works/* and @mariozechner/* imports without the actual pi packages being installed locally. See docs/specifications/taskplane/code-quality-gates.md section 6.1.3.
